description:
The table presents a hierarchical land cover/land use nomenclature for Riparian Zones (RZ), structured according to MAES (Mapping and Assessment of Ecosystems and their Services) ecosystem types, ranging from Level 1 to Level 4 with corresponding codes.

| Class Level 1                       | Class Level 2                                            | Class Level 3                                               | Class Level 4                 | Code Level 2 | Code Level 3 | Code Level 4 |
|-------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------|--------------|--------------|--------------|
